'''napuvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:miasma|miasma]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-p-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:miasma|miasma]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| napuvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:næpivith|næpivith]] || [[word:næpivij|næpivij]] || [[word:næpivish|næpivish]] || [[word:næpivi|næpivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:napupuvuth|napupuvuth]] || [[word:napupuvuj|napupuvuj]] || [[word:napupuvush|napupuvush]] || [[word:napupuvu|napupuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:napuvuth|napuvuth]] || [[word:napuvuj|napuvuj]] || [[word:napuvush|napuvush]] || [[word:napuvu|napuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:napufvuth|napufvuth]] || [[word:napufvuj|napufvuj]] || [[word:napufvush|napufvush]] || [[word:napufvuf|napufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:napuvuthu|napuvuthu]] || [[word:napuvuju|napuvuju]] || [[word:napuvushu|napuvushu]] || [[word:napuvuku|napuvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:napuvuth|napuvuth]] || [[word:napuvuj|napuvuj]] || [[word:napuvush|napuvush]] || [[word:napuvu|napuvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:napuvuthul|napuvuthul]] || [[word:napuvujul|napuvujul]] || [[word:napuvushul|napuvushul]] || [[word:napuvukul|napuvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:napuvuthuthu|napuvuthuthu]] || [[word:napuvujuju|napuvujuju]] || [[word:napuvushushu|napuvushushu]] || [[word:napuvuku|napuvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:napuvuthun|napuvuthun]] || [[word:napuvujun|napuvujun]] || [[word:napuvushun|napuvushun]] || [[word:napuvukun|napuvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:napuvuthuoro|napuvuthuoro]] || [[word:napuvujuoro|napuvujuoro]] || [[word:napuvushuoro|napuvushuoro]] || [[word:napuvukuoro|napuvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
